name: eventfinder
description: An LLM script package for finding and processing events

scripts.setup: npm run setup:build && cd setup/build && claude-code
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('./build')) fs.rmSync('./build', { recursive: true });" --input-type=commonjs
scripts.build: npm run build:dirs && npm run build:copy
scripts.build:dirs: node --input-type=commonjs -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['build', 'build/.claude', 'build/.claude/commands', 'build/context'].forEach(dir => fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true }));"
